title: Nimbu's: Pocket Dimensions
description: A mod that adds simple, customizable pocket dimensions that can be accessed from anywhere.
body:
![Nimbu icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32ce7015222543ea15fb62d5f1c9de8148cd9a1a.png)

**(Compatible with Sinytra Connector!)**

**[WARNING! I'm aware of some issues using this mod on multiplayer servers, so expect problems. Essential mod works fine though.]**

Welcome to Nimbu's: Pocket Dimensions - a mod intended to add vanilla friendly customizable pocket dimensions that can be accessed from any location, and used for anything.

## Required Dependencies:
- [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api/versions?g=1.21.1&l=fabric)
- [DimLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimlib/versions)

# Guide (Short):

## Gateway Wand:

These pocket dimensions can be accessed from any location using a Gateway Wand.

![Gateway wand crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b7ddc740fe86cb88347b5e786681b95299de014.png)

![GIF of a gateway wand being used to open a gateway.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/511863746399abb1fd20d6dd95b2f366dd4b8a26.gif)

The wand can be crafted with an echo shard and breeze rod as shown, and create a Gateway when right clicked.
Using the Gateway Wand on a created Gateway will destroy it.

## Expansion Gem:
Pocket Dimensions are limited in size however - at least until Expansion Gems are crafted and used to open up an additional area of space.

![Expansion gem crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59cdadb58b10605f37536c49c2bab66fde7f7729.png)

Expansion Gems are crafted with a diamond, amethyst shard and ender pearl.
Holding the gem in the pocket dimension will make the borders fully visible, and can be right clicked on to be expanded. 

![A player expanding their pocket dimension with an expansion gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49fe804c450136e4bfb90dcaa62e4ead542d8c23.png)

[Note: Borders are not visible if shaders are on]

## Dimension Customizer:
Lastly, the biome colours (colour of grass, leaves, water and sky) can be modified with the Dimension Customiser, as well as the material the Gateway itself is made out of (see the gallery for example uses).

![Dimension customizer crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00aa27f31379576f19e8694eb0c52c0b889ab479.png)

This can be interacted with to freely modify the pocket dimension as the user pleases, and is made with 3 chiseled stone bricks, 2 cobblestone and an end crystal.
